arts.ttl: PSG evolution offers Tottenham chance to reignite forgotten reputation in Super Cup
arts.sum: Thomas Frank guides Spurs in Udine with a chance to claim a trophy in his first match in charge against the European champions PSG

arts.ttl: PSG/Tottenham – The Parisian squad: players out and a big debut
arts.sum: This Wednesday (kickoff at 9 p.m., broadcast on Canal+), Paris Saint-Germain will face Tottenham at the Bluenergy Stadium in Udine in the 2025 European Super Cup. Here is the squad selected by Parisian coach Luis Enrique. Goalkeepers – Chevalier, Safonov, Marin. Defenders – Beraldo, Hakimi, Hernandez, Kamara, Marquinhos, Mendes, Pacho. Midfielders – Doué, Ruiz, Vitinha, […]

arts.ttl: PSG/Tottenham – Paris line-up announced with Chevalier !
arts.sum: This Wednesday, Paris Saint-Germain will face Tottenham Hotspur at the Bluenergy Stadium in Udine in the 2025 European Super Cup (kick-off at 9 p.m. CET). This Tuesday, Le Parisien predicted a likely Parisian team. As a reminder, João Neves (20-year-old midfielder) is suspended. Kvaratskhelia – Dembélé – Doué Ruiz – Vitinha – Zaïre-Emery Mendes – […]
